title: Parser accepts invalid CREATE TRIGGER syntax
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
CREATE TRIGGER invalid_trigger AFTER INSERT ON test_table FOR EACH ROW BEGIN SELECT 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Invalid CREATE TRIGGER syntax accepted by parser
